particulars.description: By way of fixed charge all estates and interests in any freehold or leasehold property of the company both present and future togetehr with all buildings and fixtures and fixed plant and machinery, all stocks, shares, bonds, loan capital and other securities both present and future of the company, all book debts and other debts both present and future, all goodwill and uncalled capital, all intellectual proeprty rights and licences and ancillary rights and benefits, all plant, machinery and other equipment, and by way of floating charge the undertaking and all other property, assets and rights of the company both present and future not otherwise effectively charges by way of fixed charge,.
